name: Annie Mae Jones' Buttermilk Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Sift flour, salt, baking soda, and baking powder into a mixing bowl. Using two knives or a pastry cutter, cut in the shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Gradually add buttermilk, stirring with a fork until a soft dough forms.
3. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead briefly. Roll the dough to 1/2 inch thickness. Cut into rounds using a biscuit cutter.
4. Place the biscuits on an ungreased baking sheet, spacing them not touching (for crisper biscuits) or close together (for softer biscuits).
5. Brush the biscuits with melted butter if desired. Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until firm and lightly browned.
